mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP (GDPC1) directly expands corporate earnings expectations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in GDPC1 contraction quarters are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite the UNRATE threshold breach, or t-test p-value exceeds 0.05 for negative returns.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production (INDPRO) expands while core inflation (CPIAUCSL) remains stable, it indicates benign supply-side growth that boosts equity valuations over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60d returns when INDPRO growth exceeds 2% annually and CPIAUCSL YoY stays below 2.5%, or cross-validation IC drops below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening monetary cycle, further increases in the federal funds rate compress equity valuations by raising the discount rate, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive or statistically indistinguishable from zero during consecutive FEDFUNDS hikes above 1.5%, or rolling 3-year IC is consistently positive.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts reflect sustained consumer confidence and credit availability, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through sector rotation and wealth effects.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns show no significant positive correlation with HOUST month-over-month changes over a 5-year rolling window, or Sharpe ratio of long-only signal falls below 0.1.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in retail sales indicates weakening consumer demand, which reduces corporate revenue forecasts and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d forward returns are not significantly negative when RSAFS falls below the 5% threshold, or the signal predicts positive returns in > 40% of out-of-sample cases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) and a declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) confirms robust labor market expansion, supporting sustained equity risk premiums and positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS/UNRATE signal fails to yield positive 60d returns when payroll growth exceeds 150k/month and UNRATE falls below 4.5%, or information coefficient decays to zero after 12 months.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production exceeds its long-term trend threshold, it signals strong manufacturing momentum that drives short-term positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d forward returns are negative or flat when INDPRO remains above 102 for consecutive months without accompanying GDP growth acceleration, or win rate drops below 45%.
